evidence.snippet:
SA COMPUTE PRO-AR
=================
Advanced Cybersecurity with Modular Standards-based Mission Computing

#### Pioneering Security, Safety and Compliance for Uncrewed Missions
Mobilicom’s innovative Operational Security, Safety, and Standards Compliance (OS3) platform secures uncrewed systems with advanced cybersecurity, safety protocols, and compliance management. Protect critical assets, reduce risk, and ensure mission success in challenging environments.

items.notes: SA COMPUTE PRO-AT and SA COMPUTE PRO-AR are Pixhawk-based autonomous platform compute modules; OS3 Platform Software covers safety protocols for uncrewed missions

headquarters.notes: Mobilicom Limited (Australia) is the ASX-listed parent. Also has offices in Shoham, Israel and Wilmington, DE, USA.

evidence.snippet: Mobilicom is an end-to-end provider of cybersecurity and smart solutions for drones, robotics & autonomous platforms. As a high-tech company, it designs, develops, and delivers smart solutions focused primarily on targeting global drone, robotics, and autonomous system manufacturers.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells communications hardware (SDRs, mesh networking), GCS hardware, and cybersecurity/autonomy software to drone and robotics OEMs worldwide. Explicitly targets 'global drone, robotics, and autonomous system manufacturers'.

items.name: SkyHopper PRO
items.product_type: cognitive SDR datalink for drones and robotics

evidence.snippet: SkyHopper Pro

SkyHopper PRO Lite is a compact cognitive SDR optimized for aerial drones and smaller robotics. It offers reliable, low-latency communication, ideal for payload-sensitive UAVs. The lightweight design ensures seamless integration into smaller platforms for flexible, scalable mission capabilities.

items.name: SkyHopper PRO Micro
items.product_type: ultra-compact cognitive SDR for loitering munitions and mini drones

evidence.snippet: The SkyHopper PRO Micro is an ultra-compact cognitive SDR designed for high-volume production of loitering munitions, mini drones, and robotics. With the smallest C-SWaP (cost, size, weight, and power) in the family, it offers reliable communication for mission-critical applications, ensuring seamless integration into lightweight and high-performance platforms.

items.name: SA COMPUTE PRO-AR
items.product_type: secured autonomy compute module (NVIDIA Jetson Orin / Pixhawk)

evidence.snippet:
SA COMPUTE PRO-AR
=================
Advanced Cybersecurity with Modular Standards-based Mission Computing
*   [SA COMPUTE PRO-AT](https://mobilicom.com/products/sa-compute-pro-at/)
Built for mission-critical operations, our NDAA-compliant, Blue UAS-certified technologies ensure secure communication, high-resilience performance, and real-time control in contested environments.

Mobilicom’s NDAA-compliant end-to-end hardware and software solutions are currently integrated into drones and robotics deployed in defense and commercial applications worldwide, including in UASs purchased by the U.S. DoD. Federal contractors are required to abide by NDAA requirements which prohibit the use of equipment made in China.

### NDAA Compliant
The product complies with the National Defense Authorization Act requirements.

ndaa.notes: NDAA compliance is explicitly and repeatedly claimed across products page, SkyHopper PRO page, and Blue UAS certification news.

evidence.snippet: Defense Innovation Unit Certifies Mobilicom's Combat-Proven SkyHopper Datalinks for Blue UAS Framework

**Cybersecure.
Combat proven.
Now Blue UAS Certiﬁed.**

Powered by NVIDIA Jetson Orin and built on Pixhawk open standards, PRO-AR gives OEMs the flexibility to integrate and scale quickly. Its Blue UAS Framework certification, NDAA compliance, and U.S.-made reliability accelerate procurement while ensuring operators can deploy Group 1 and Group 2 systems with confidence.

blue_uas.notes: DIU certified SkyHopper PRO, PRO Lite, and PRO Micro for the Blue UAS Framework (Feb 2025). SA COMPUTE PRO-AR also carries Blue UAS Framework certification.

evidence.snippet: The company holds patented technology & unique know-how for Mobile Mesh networking. It has an extensive, field-proven portfolio of commercialized products used in various applications.

Mobilicom’s large solution portfolio has been deployed worldwide, seeing the Company derive revenue from hardware, software sales & licensing fees, and professional support services for its solutions.

readiness.notes: Field-proven portfolio of commercialized products deployed worldwide; revenue from hardware, software sales and licensing.

unresolved_questions: Primary operational headquarters (Israel vs. Australia): corporate parent is Australian (ASX-listed Mobilicom Limited in Melbourne), but founders and main R&D are in Shoham, Israel.
SA COMPUTE PRO-AT product details: product page not deeply read; assumed analogous to PRO-AR based on nav listing.
tagline: Manufactures secure datalinks (SkyHopper series), mesh networking (MCU), ground control stations, and cybersecurity/autonomy platform software (OS3, ICE) for uncrewed systems. NDAA-compliant and Blue UAS certified. Melbourne-based; field-proven in defense contexts, though independent validation of claimed capabilities remains limited in public domain.
